# format: html5-dom-v1
# status: active
# include_parse_errors: true
#document
  <!doctype html>
  <html>
    <head>
    <body>
      <ul>
        <li>
          "one"
        <li>
          "two"
parse-errors:
  tree-builder: before-html-implicit-html
  tree-builder: before-head-implicit-head
  tree-builder: after-head-implicit-body
  tree-builder: in-body-li-start-tag-closes-previous-li
  tree-builder: in-body-any-other-end-tag-blocked-by-special
